title: MP Board Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MP Board Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education (MPBSE) Result 2026 out for Class 10th and 12th annual exams on the official website - mpbse.nic.in and mpresults.nic.in on 15-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MP Board Class 10th 12th result

content.text: The Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education (MPBSE) has officially released the MP Board Class 10th 12th Result 2026 for the High School (HSC) and Higher Secondary (HSSC) board examinations conducted in the 2025-26 academic session. The results for both Class 10th and Class 12th have been declared together in online mode, allowing students to check their subject-wise marks and overall pass status from anywhere.

MP Board Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - mpbse.nic.in. Students can visit mpresults.nic.in or the MPBSE result page, select the Class 10th or 12th result link, and log in using their roll number and application number to view and download their digital marksheet. After downloading the provisional result, candidates must carefully verify their personal details, subjects and marks, and contact their school or MPBSE immediately in case of any discrepancy or error in the marksheet.

MPBSE has updated its result servers with the MP Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2026, and the result links have been activated on mpresults.nic.in as well as mpbse.nic.in for all registered candidates. Students can use their roll number and application number to access an online marksheet, which shows their subject-wise marks, total marks and pass/fail status.

rows: Board of Secondary Education, Madhya Pradesh (MPBSE)
Class 10th (High School HSC), Class 12th (Higher Secondary HSSC)
MP Board Class 10th Result 2026, MP Board Class 12th Result 2026
Minimum 33 percent marks in each subject and overall

content.text: MPBSE has activated direct links to check MP Board Class 10th 12th Result 2026 on its official result portals, ensuring quick and easy access for students. Candidates can use the links given below to open the MP Board result page, select the HSC (Class 10) or HSSC (Class 12) result, and download their marksheet by entering their roll number and application number.

sections.heading: Steps to Check MP Board Class 10th 12th Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check MP Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2026 online using the official MPBSE result portals.

items: Visit the official MP Board result website mpresults.nic.in or go to mpbse.nic.in and open the "Examination Results" page.
On the results page, click on the link that says "MPBSE - HSC (Class 10th) Main Examination Results - 2026" or "MPBSE - HSSC (Class 12th) Main Examination Results - 2026" as per your class.
You will be redirected to the result login window for the selected class.
Enter your Roll Number and Application Number exactly as mentioned on your admit card in the respective fields.
Click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button to proceed.
Your MP Board Class 10th or 12th Result 2026 will appear on the screen, displaying subject-wise marks, total marks and overall result status.
Download the online marksheet and take a printout for future reference until the original marksheet and certificate are issued by your school.

seo_tags: MP Board result 2026 date and time
how to check MPBSE result 2026 online
